title: Microstegium monanthum
taxonomy: Microstegium monanthum is classified as a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the tribe Paniceae, a group of grasses native to tropical and subtropical regions. The genus Microstegium is a small group of grasses that are primarily found in Asia and Africa. The species is further classified as a perennial grass, meaning it regenerates new growth each year. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary history and ecological roles of Microstegium monanthum.
